outcome_access_before_amendment: The second execution fit the preregistered task and proxy models and constructed the proxy certificate, then stopped before channel optimization because the identity transform had been passed as a matrix instead of a one-element library. It wrote no artifact, release decision, channel, diagnostic risk, or gate result.
reason: Wrap each label-specific identity transform in a one-element candidate library, matching the optimizer's existing public contract. This changes no numerical input, confidence region, threshold, partition, gate, or evaluation.
